hook.summary: Pigs in hard hats pop up from holes in a Whac-A-Mole style game in front of a slot machine mansion.
hook.visual_action: Pigs and a wolf pop up from holes in the ground in front of a large slot machine building.

scene_flow: Pigs in construction hats pop up from holes in the foreground.
A wolf character pops up and laughs mischievously among the pigs.
The background features a 'Money Mansion' slot machine displaying various jackpot values.
The animation loops the popping pigs and wolf while the 'PLAY NOW!' button remains static.
audience_proxy: Adults 40+ who enjoy casual casino games and classic slot machine mechanics.
